query: Hvad kan du fortælle mig om Københavns Kommune?
criteria: Response should fetch data from kommune.dk for København, using either the URL https://www.kommune.dk/koebenhavn/ (note ASCII transliteration of ø to oe) or the REST API GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=koebenhavn. Should present factual content from one or more of the 12 sections (overblik, historisk ridse, borgerservice, boligmarkedet, parkering, affald/miljø, skoler/pasning, uddannelsessteder, kulturliv, erhvervsliv, foreningsliv, populære bydele).

query: List all the Danish municipalities covered by kommune.dk
criteria: Response should retrieve the list via GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/wp/v2/pages (with pagination via per_page) or by parsing https://www.kommune.dk/wp-sitemap-posts-page-1.xml. Should yield 98 municipalities (plus optionally homepage). Should NOT hardcode a list from training data without fetching.

query: Get me the page content for Brøndby kommune
criteria: Response should request https://www.kommune.dk/broendby/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=broendby (correct transliteration of ø to oe). Should return the page's content.rendered block HTML or extracted text.

query: hvor meget koster parkering i aarhus?
criteria: Response should fetch the Aarhus page from kommune.dk (URL https://www.kommune.dk/aarhus/ or via REST API slug lookup) and extract information from the 'parkering' section. Should rely on kommune.dk content rather than other sources.

query: Use the WordPress REST API on kommune.dk to get site info
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/ to retrieve site info (name, description, WordPress version etc.).

query: I need data about schools and daycare options in Hørsholm municipality
criteria: Response should fetch the Hørsholm page using slug 'hoersholm' (ø to oe), via https://www.kommune.dk/hoersholm/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=hoersholm, and extract content from the 'skoler/pasning' section.

query: Hvem skrev indholdet på kommune.dk?
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/wp/v2/users/1 to retrieve author information.

query: give me the page id for læsø on kommune.dk
criteria: Response should look up Læsø via GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=laesoe (correct transliteration: æ to ae, ø to oe) on https://www.kommune.dk/, and return the page id from the JSON response.

query: Tell me about cultural life and associations in Odense
criteria: Response should fetch the Odense page from kommune.dk (https://www.kommune.dk/odense/ or REST API slug lookup) and extract content from the 'kulturliv' and 'foreningsliv' sections.

query: What's the housing market like in Gentofte?
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.kommune.dk/gentofte/ or use GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=gentofte and extract content from the 'boligmarkedet' section.

query: Fetch the oembed representation of the Aalborg page on kommune.dk
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/oembed/1.0/embed?url=https://www.kommune.dk/aalborg/ to retrieve the oEmbed data.

query: Jeg leder efter information om erhvervsliv i Esbjerg kommune
criteria: Response should fetch the Esbjerg page from kommune.dk (https://www.kommune.dk/esbjerg/ or REST API slug lookup) and report on the 'erhvervsliv' section content.

query: what post types does kommune.dk support?
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/wp/v2/types/page (or /wp-json/wp/v2/types) to retrieve post type registry. Should note that the site uses only flat pages - no blog, comments, or custom post types.

query: compare demographics overview between Frederiksberg and Vesthimmerland
criteria: Response should fetch both pages: https://www.kommune.dk/frederiksberg/ and https://www.kommune.dk/vesthimmerland/ (or via REST API slug lookups), extract content from the 'overblik' (overview/demographics) sections, and present a comparison.

query: I want to know about waste collection and environmental services in Roskilde
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.kommune.dk/roskilde/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=roskilde and extract content from the 'affald/miljø' (waste/environment) section.

query: give me the homepage content of kommune.dk via the api
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.kommune.dk/wp-json/wp/v2/pages/2 (homepage page ID is 2, slug 'kommune-dk') or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=kommune-dk to retrieve homepage block HTML.

query: find me the historical background of Ærø
criteria: Response should fetch the Ærø page using transliterated slug 'aeroe' (Æ to ae, ø to oe), via https://www.kommune.dk/aeroe/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=aeroe, and extract content from the 'historisk ridse' section.

query: popular neighborhoods in Aalborg please
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.kommune.dk/aalborg/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=aalborg and extract content from the 'populære bydele' section.

query: Are there any rate limits or crawl restrictions I should know about when scraping kommune.dk?
criteria: Response should mention that robots.txt specifies Crawl-delay: 10 (10 seconds between requests). May also note that the REST API is public/anonymous with no authentication required.

query: borgerservice info for Vejle
criteria: Response should fetch https://www.kommune.dk/vejle/ or GET /wp-json/wp/v2/pages?slug=vejle and extract content from the 'borgerservice' (citizen services) section.
